title: Add PromptForge / KIRA to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [PromptForge / KIRA](https://knowledgeable-interface-for-refinem.vercel.app) to chat
- PromptForge / KIRA fixes AI input by making prompts more specific and context-aware, addressing vague, context-free requests that can lead to unhelpful responses.

Fixes #10507

gist.headline: Forging better prompts
gist.blurb: PromptForge (KIRA) just landed in the community greenhouse! It takes your vague AI prompts and hammers them into highly specific, context-aware masterpieces.
gist.summary: Added PromptForge (KIRA) to the community apps showcase, a tool designed to refine vague AI inputs into specific, context-aware prompts.
gist.impact: Users can now explore PromptForge in the greenhouse to improve their prompt engineering and get more helpful, accurate responses from AI models.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy blacksmith's forge but for text/code. Polly the bee wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, working at a glowing anvil with the Monitor Robot. The anvil has glowing text or code on it, representing the 'forging' of prompts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering glowing text on a small anvil. A chunky retro monitor robot watches eagerly, its screen glowing. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, hammering glowing text on a small anvil. A chunky retro monitor robot watches eagerly, its screen glowing. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
